bannerTickerText: 🕉️ Experience the Divine Adi Kailash & Om Parvat Yatra 2026 - Bookings Open!
📞 Contact our High Altitude Specialists at +91 9557092965 or +91 7248737777
💼 Registered with Uttarakhand Tourism Board (Reg ID: NT-2026)
✈️ Mount Kailash Aerial Darshan Flight (Lucknow Base) - No Chinese Visa/Passport Required!
🏔️ Outer Line Permits & medical forms handled seamlessly by Adi Kailash Tirath team.

heroSlides.title: Travel Where Spirit Meets The Himalaya
heroSlides.subtitle: Kailash Mansarovar Yatra
heroSlides.desc: Adi Kailash Tirath curates spiritually meaningful journeys with clear planning, trusted stays, permit guidance, and dedicated mountain-ground support from departure to return.

heroSlides.title: Experience the Divine Mystery of Snow Symbolism
heroSlides.subtitle: Adi Kailash & Om Parvat
heroSlides.desc: Watch the holy self-formed divine Om symbol appear naturally in pristine white snow. Explore Parvati Kund, Gauri Kund, and the source of Vyas valley spirituality accompanied by seasoned native sherpas.

heroSlides.title: The Ultimate Four Abodes of the Deities
heroSlides.subtitle: Classics of Chardham
heroSlides.desc: An all-inclusive, divine expedition covering Yamunotri, Gangotri, Kedarnath, and Badrinath. Relax in pre-vetted warm riverside cottages with healthy pure organic vegetarian cuisine.

circularDestinations.title: Adi Kailash Parvat
circularDestinations.description: Adi Kailash, also known as Chhota Kailash, is a sacred Himalayan peak in the Pithoragarh district of Uttarakhand that is revered by Hindus as a highly accessible replica and the primordial earthly abode of Lord Shiva.

circularDestinations.title: Complete Chardham
circularDestinations.description: Divine yatra of Yamunotri, Gangotri, Kedarnath, and Badrinath shrines.

circularDestinations.title: Om Parvat Frontier
circularDestinations.description: Witness the natural sacred snow symbols forming eternal Om patterns.

circularDestinations.title: Munsyari Hills
circularDestinations.description: Amazing hill vistas, snow peaks, and Birthi waterfalls walks.

circularDestinations.title: Kainchi Dham Ashram
circularDestinations.description: Peaceful ashram valleys of Baba Neem Karoli near the Kumaon lakes.

circularDestinations.title: Maa Purnagiri Shrine
circularDestinations.description: Revered mountain top Shaktipith overlooking the gushing Sharda River.

circularDestinations.title: Panchachuli Ranges
circularDestinations.description: Expeditions near the base camp of the magnificent five snow pinnacles.

circularDestinations.title: Darma Valley
circularDestinations.description: Hidden glacial frontier valleys on the Indo-Tibetan trade rim.

circularDestinations.title: Chirkilla Reservoir
circularDestinations.description: Scenic dam lake on Kali river valley with boating and eco tours.

circularDestinations.title: Narayan Ashram Retreat
circularDestinations.description: Vedic meditation and peace library at 9000 feet near Tawaghat borders.

packages.title: Adi Kailash & Om Parvat Tour
packages.overview: A 3-day divine and adventurous journey through the mystical Himalayas covering Adi Kailash and Om Parvat.
highlights: Divine tour of Adi Kailash and Om Parvat
inclusion: Meals: Breakfast & Dinner, Unlimited Tea & Coffee
exclusion: Additional sightseeing not mentioned in the itinerary

itinerary.title: Pithoragarh to Napalchu
itinerary.details: Depart from Pithoragarh in a comfortable SUV (Bolero/Scorpio/ISUZU). Enjoy scenic mountain views en route to Napalchu. Check-in at a cozy homestay and relax. Evening at leisure, followed by dinner.

itinerary.title: Napalchu to Adi Kailash
itinerary.details: Early morning departure for Adi Kailash, one of the holiest peaks in the Himalayas. Witness the breathtaking landscapes and spiritual vibes of the sacred mountain. Explore the area and soak in the divine energy. Return to Napalchu for dinner and an overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Adi Kailash to Om Parvat to Pithoragarh
itinerary.details: Visit the mystical Om Parvat, where snow naturally forms the sacred ॐ symbol. Experience the serenity of this rare phenomenon. Complimentary visit to Lipulekh, adding to the spiritual journey. Return journey to Pithoragarh, concluding the tour.

packages.title: Adi Kailash ,Om Parvat Yatra and Panchachuli Package
packages.overview: Complete journey from Tanakpur to Adi Kailash, Om Parvat and Panchachuli Base camp with vehicle options.
highlights: Sacred Darshan of Adi Kailash and Om Parvat
Vehicle options: Bolero, Scorpio N 4*4, Isuzu
inclusion: Meals as mentioned in the itinerary
exclusion: Additional sightseeing not mentioned in the itinerary
Any other services not listed in inclusions

itinerary.title: Arrival at Pithoragarh
itinerary.details: Morning pickup from Tanakpur. Arrival at Pithoragarh. Check-in and complete Inner Line Permit documentation. After lunch, enjoy leisure time exploring D and nearby. Dinner and overnight stay at the hotel. Meals: Lunch, Dinner. Activities: Sightseeing, Leisure. Services: Transportation, Accommodation

itinerary.title: Pithoragarh to Gunji/Napalchu
itinerary.details: Breakfast at Dharchula. Drive to Gunji/Napalchu, the base village for Adi Kailash and Om Parvat. Lunch en route. Arrival at Gunji in the evening. Dinner and overnight stay at a homestay. Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner. Activities: Sightseeing. Services: Transportation, Accommodation

itinerary.title: Gunji/Napalchu to Adi Kailash and Back
itinerary.details: Early morning drive from Gunji to Adi Kailash. Trek 2–3 KM from Jolingkong to Parvati Sarovar. Perform Pooja and meditate at Lord Shiva and Parvati Temple near the Sarovar. Lunch and return drive to Gunji. En route, visit Brahma Parvat, Pandava Parvat, Pandava Fort, and Parvati Mukut. Dinner and overnight stay at a homestay. Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner. Activities: Sightseeing, Trekking, Meditation. Services: Transportation, Accommodation

itinerary.title: Gunji to Om Parvat and Back
itinerary.details: Breakfast at Gunji. Drive to Om Parvat. Meditate near the sacred Om Parvat. En route, visit Kali Mandir, Kala Paani, Sheshnag Parvat, and Ved Vyas Gufa. Return to Gunji/Nabhi for dinner and overnight stay at the homestay. Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner. Activities: Sightseeing, Meditation. Services: Transportation, Accommodation

itinerary.title: Gunji to Pithoragarh
itinerary.details: Breakfast at Gunji. Drive to Dantu. Trek to panchachuli base camp. Meals: Breakfast. Activities: Sightseeing. Services: Transportation, Accommodation

itinerary.title: Pithoragarh to Tanakpur
itinerary.details: Breakfast at dharchula. Drive back to tankapur. Drop-off at tanakpur. Meals: Breakfast. Activities: Sightseeing. Services: Transportation

packages.title: Char Dham Yatra Package
packages.overview: Embark on the sacred Char Dham Yatra and seek divine blessings at Yamunotri, Gangotri, Kedarnath, and Badrinath.
highlights: Divine Darshan of Yamunotri, Gangotri, Kedarnath, and Badrinath
Scenic drive via Dehradun, Mussoorie, and Tehri Dam
inclusion: Homestay accommodation for an authentic and comfortable experience (Camps/Tents in Kedarnath)
Comfortable vehicle with an experienced driver (Ertiga, Bolero, Scorpio, Isuzu)
First aid kit in the vehicle
exclusion: Lunch, personal expenses, pony/doli for trekking
Any temple donations or additional sightseeing not mentioned

itinerary.title: Arrival in Haridwar – Barkot/Jankichatti (210 km | 7-8 hrs)
itinerary.details: Take a holy dip in the Ganges. Drive via Dehradun & Mussoorie. En route visit Kempty Falls. Check-in at the homestay in Barkot/Jankichatti. Meals: Dinner | Stay: Homestay

itinerary.title: Barkot/Jankichatti – Yamunotri – Barkot/Jankichatti (42 km drive + 5 km trek each way)
itinerary.details: Drive to Janki Chatti via Hanuman Chatti & Fool Chatti. Trek 6 km to Yamunotri. Take a dip in Garam Kund, perform Pooja & Darshan. Trek back and return to Barkot. Meals: Breakfast & Dinner | Stay: Homestay

itinerary.title: Barkot – Uttarkashi (100 km | 4 hrs)
itinerary.details: Drive to Uttarkashi. Visit Vishwanath Temple. Leisure time in Uttarkashi. Meals: Breakfast & Dinner | Stay: Homestay

itinerary.title: Uttarkashi – Gangotri – Uttarkashi (120 km round trip | 5 hrs)
itinerary.details: Early morning drive to Gangotri. Pooja & Darshan at Gangotri Temple. Visit Gangnani & Harsil en route. Return to Uttarkashi. Meals: Breakfast & Dinner | Stay: Homestay

itinerary.title: Uttarkashi – Guptkashi/Sitapur (290 km | 8-9 hrs)
itinerary.details: Early morning departure. Drive via Tehri Dam. Check-in at Sitapur/Guptkashi. Meals: Breakfast & Dinner | Stay: Homestay

itinerary.title: Sitapur – Kedarnath (Drive + Trek)
itinerary.details: Drive to Phata/Sonprayag. Trek to Kedarnath (or take a helicopter ride at extra cost). Pooja & Darshan at Kedarnath Temple. Meals: Breakfast & Dinner | Stay: Camps/Tents

itinerary.title: Kedarnath – Phata/Guptkashi
itinerary.details: Return to Phata/Guptkashi after Darshan. Meals: Breakfast & Dinner | Stay: Homestay

itinerary.title: Sitapur/Chopta – Badrinath (220 km | 7-8 hrs)
itinerary.details: Drive via Chopta & Joshimath. Visit Narsimha Temple & Shankaracharya Math. Evening Darshan at Badrinath Temple. Meals: Breakfast & Dinner | Stay: Homestay

itinerary.title: Badrinath – Haridwar (140 km | 5 hrs)
itinerary.details: Early morning Tapt Kund bath & Badrivishal Darshan. Visit Mana, Vyas Gufa, Charanpaduka, Bhimkund. En route, visit Rudraprayag, Devprayag & Rishikesh. Drop at Haridwar Railway Station – Tour Ends! Meals: Breakfast

packages.title: Adi Kailash & Pithoragarh Adventure Tour
packages.overview: A 7-day spiritual and adventure tour experiencing the divine beauty of Adi Kailash and Panchachuli via Pithoragarh.
highlights: Visit Kainchi Dham, Jageshwar Dham, and Patal Bhuvaneshwar
Divine Darshan of Om Parvat and Adi Kailash
inclusion: Transportation (ISUZU DMAX, SCORPIO N, BOLERO – Optional)
Two meals per day (Breakfast & Dinner) and Tea
All permits and taxes during the trip
exclusion: Special puja & darshan charges at temples

itinerary.title: Kathgodam – Kainchi Dham – Jageshwar Temple – Chaukori
itinerary.details: Departure from Kathgodam in the morning. Visit and rest at Kainchi Dham. Visit Jageshwar Dham and have lunch. Evening arrival at Chaukori, check-in at homestay and rest.

itinerary.title: Chaukori – Patal Bhuvaneshwar – Hat Kalika Temple – Pithoragarh – Dharchula
itinerary.details: Breakfast followed by a visit to Patal Bhuvaneshwar Cave. Visit Hat Kalika Temple in Gangolihat. Lunch in Pithoragarh and sightseeing. Evening arrival at Dharchula, check-in at homestay and rest.

itinerary.title: Dharchula – Panchachuli Base Camp
itinerary.details: Breakfast and departure for Panchachuli Glacier. Enjoy scenic mountain views along the way. Evening arrival at Panchachuli Base Camp. Overnight stay at Panchachuli.

itinerary.title: Panchachuli – Narayan Ashram – Napalchu
itinerary.details: Morning departure from Panchachuli to Narayan Ashram. Experience spiritual tranquility and have lunch at Narayan Ashram. Evening arrival at Napalchu, check-in and rest.

itinerary.title: Napalchu – Om Parvat – Napalchu
itinerary.details: Early morning departure for Om Parvat Darshan. Enjoy breathtaking views of the Himalayas throughout the journey. Return to Napalchu by evening for an overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Napalchu – Adi Kailash – Napalchu
itinerary.details: Breakfast followed by a journey to Adi Kailash. Perform circumambulation (parikrama) and darshan of the sacred mountain. Return to Napalchu for overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Napalchu – Kathgodam
itinerary.details: Morning departure. Enjoy sightseeing at local attractions en route. Evening arrival at Kathgodam, marking the end of the journey.

travelStories.name: Dr. Rajesh K. Sharma
travelStories.quote: Standing before the giant natural Om on the peak at Nabhidhang was the most emotional second of my lifetime. Adi Kailash Tirath's coordination was fantastic. Stays were warm and clean despite freezing climates.

travelStories.name: Mrs. Revathi Subramanian
travelStories.quote: As elderly yatris, my husband and I had lost hope of seeing Mount Kailash due to medical trek restrictions. Adi Kailash Tirath's Aerial flight yatra let us see Shiva's Lordly peak elegantly. Har Har Mahadev!

travelStories.name: Amit & Priya Deshmukh
travelStories.quote: With helicopter blockages in Kedarnath, our guide managed immediate local pony resources and luxury homestays for us. Pure vegetarian organic food was cooked fresh every day. Absolute five stars!

travelStories.name: Shri Mahendra Pratap Singh
travelStories.quote: Being a senior citizen, I was worried about physical fatigue at high altitudes. The local guides treated me like family and helped me reach Parvati Kund with total convenience.

travelStories.name: Dr. Anjali Deshpande
travelStories.quote: Breathtakingly simple! Seeing holy Mount Kailash without Chinese visa delay or biometric stress was a spiritual boom. Strongly recommend Adi Kailash Tirath.

travelStories.name: Vikram & Shreya Patel
travelStories.quote: A perfectly organized yatra with five-star hospitality in remote valleys. Helicopter slots, VIP Darshans, and premium stays were completely top-notch.

yatriFeedbacks.name: Shri Srinivasan Iyer
yatriFeedbacks.quote: The tour organization was flawless. Going to an altitude of 14,000 feet requires great logistic care, and the team provided continuous medical oxygen backup and outstanding homestays.

yatriFeedbacks.name: Smt. Meenakshi Dhoundiyal
yatriFeedbacks.quote: Our entire family completed the holy Chardham Yatra safely. The food was 100% pure organic vegetarian, cooked fresh every day with hygienic guidelines. Incredible experience!

yatriFeedbacks.name: Ravi Teja Yadav
yatriFeedbacks.quote: Due to health constraints, standard high-altitude walking was impossible for me. The Aerial flight gave such stunningly close window viewings of Kailash & Mansarovar. Truly divine!

yatriFeedbacks.name: Shri Naresh Chandra Sen
yatriFeedbacks.quote: Every single day was blessed. The driver had incredible skills on Himalayan curves, and the spiritual satsangs organized in Dharchula warmed our souls.

yatriFeedbacks.name: Smt. Sharda Devadiga
yatriFeedbacks.quote: Pristine arrangements. From wheelchair accessibility to timely medical check-ups under local administration directions. Har Har Gange and Kedar!

yatriFeedbacks.name: Vijay & Sarita Malhotra
yatriFeedbacks.quote: Absolute comfort for seniors. Witnessing Kailash and Lake Manasarovar side-by-side on our window seat is an image burned into our minds for eternity.

blogs.title: Comprehensive Preparation Guide for Adi Kailash & Om Parvat Yatra
blogs.excerpt: Preparing your body, lungs, and packing lists for high altitude treks over 12,000 feet. Best medical tips and permit requirements analyzed.
blogs.author: Shri Ajay Basera
blogs.content: The Adi Kailash Yatra is a dream spiritual journey for millions of Shiva devotees. However, rising to Jotling and Parvati Kund (above 12,000 ft) requires deep preparation. First, spend 30 days prior working on cardiovascular breathing exercises (Anulom Vilom and walking 5 km with weights). Second, pack layered thermal woolens as temperatures in Vyas valley drop drastically near 0°C at night. Finally, always carry a small packet of camphor tabs; inhaling its aroma helps open constricted airways under low oxygen levels.

blogs.title: Why Mount Kailash Aerial Flight Darshan has Changed Sacred Tourism
blogs.excerpt: Understand how pressurized high-flying flights now offer window viewings of Mount Kailash without China passport struggles or physical fatigue.
blogs.author: Dr. K. Dwivedi
blogs.content: For decades, spiritual pilgrims had to undergo complex Chinese consulate biometrics, visa waitlists, and extremely thin Himalayan air to catch a glimpse of the holy abode of Shiva. Adi Kailash Tirath pioneered the customized mountain aviation flights. Cruising stably at high altitudes, yatris get large-window views of Kailash, Mansarovar Lake, and Mount Gurla Mandhata. It is fully accessible to children, senior citizens, and physically challenged yatris, marking a golden era in yatra accessibility.

blogs.title: Acclimatization Hacks for High Altitude Yatris: The Golden Rules
blogs.excerpt: The vital health rules that every yatri crossing Dharchula and rising into Gunji must follow to avoid Acute Mountain Sickness (AMS).
blogs.author: Adi Kailash Tirath Medical Board Advisories
blogs.content: High Altitude sickness is completely preventable if rules are followed. Rule 1: Never ascend more than 1,000 meters in a single day once you cross 8,000 feet. That is why our itineraries feature 2 rest nights in Pithoragarh & Dharchula standard. Rule 2: Force hydrate! Drink 4-5 liters of lukewarm water daily. Rule 3: Avoid caffeine, alcohol, and heavy sleep medicines, which slow breathing rates. Listen to your guide, and check oxygen levels on oximeters twice daily.
